display.name: Clear the Watchpath
display.short_description: A splintered watchpost keeps flagging the same knife-crew. The hamlet wants the path made safe again.

rules.briefing_text: A cutthroat keeps working the watchpath around the hamlet. Hunt the mark down and the board will pay in road gear.
rules.accepted_text: The watchpath mark is live now. Run the target down, then return here for payment.
rules.completed_text: The watchpath is quiet again. Choose one hamlet reward before you move on.
rules.claimed_text: The watchpath board is already marked clean. This request is settled.
